K 2( 1 )/20l l-T^ail&iKeUlam] ^f. 3RtfTI *MiHHI< ^ T , U^<M ^ t ^ 3479 GI/2012 MINISTRY OF COMMUNICATIONS AND INFORMATION TECHNOIXXJY (Department of Electronics and Information Technology) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th September, 2012 GS.R. 689(E).Бқ”In exercise of the powers conferred by the sub-section (2) of Section 96 of the Semiconductor Integrated Circuits Layout-Design Act, 2000 (37 of 2000), the Central Government here by makes the following rules to amend the Semiconductor Integrated Circuits Layout-Design Rules, 2001 namely:Бқ” 1. (I) These rules may be called the Semiconductor Integrated Circuits Layout-Design (Amendment) Rules, 2012 (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication. 2.In the Semiconductor Integrated Circuits Layout- Design Rules, 2001 in rule 10 Бқ” (a) in sub-rule (3), the words "by the bank draft", the words "by a bank draft payable to the Pay & Accounts Officer, Department of Electronics and Information Technology" shall be substituted; (b) in sub-rule (4), for the words "made payable to Registrar", the words "made payable to the Pay & Accounts Officer, Department of Electronics and Information Technology" shall be substituted. [F.No.2(l)/2011-SICLDR] Dr. ANITA BHATNAGAR JAIN, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press. Ring Road. Mayapuri. New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications. Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
